text.title: Nomad Low-Energy Mode Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Nomad Low-Energy Mode.

example.scenario: Nomad founder traveling May 25 → June 8. Low-energy mode: allowed tasks = async-standup-read + contractor-escalation + customer-emergency. Auto-reply directs to @co-founder for urgent. Daily 1-hr check-in by 18:00 UTC. June 8: return-debrief lists 4 paused items + catch-up sequence.

artefact.code: { "artefact_id": "low-energy-mode-2026-w22", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "activation_date": "2026-05-25", "expected_return": "2026-06-08", "allowed_tasks": [ "async-standup-read", "contractor-block-escalation", "customer-emergency-reply" ], "auto_reply_text": "Limited availability until June 8; for emergencies contact @co-founder; daily check-in by 18:00 UTC.", "escalation_contact": "@co-founder", "owner": "@ruslan" }
